business_ideas.idea: Fir Crown media rollup - acquire undervalued magazines (54 titles), monetize via commerce
Flying community airpark - 1500-acre residential development with runway access
Aircraft financing business - leverage flying audience for loan origination and brokerage
E-commerce businesses on magazine audiences - space merch, aviation gear, print-on-demand
Magazine-to-commerce playbook - media brands as customer acquisition for higher-margin products

predictions.text: Fir Crown will reach 1 billion dollars in revenue by 2030 through organic and inorganic growth
4500 magazine publishers with no exit creates massive acquisition opportunity for aggregator
Magazine audiences with decades of loyalty are undervalued by market and misunderstood by tech buyers
Hearst-style diversified media company model (media + venture + real estate) will outperform venture-only
